oracle: GS-7 four-member conformance oracle (warpline is the 5th producer)

executable.note: These vectors are a Python executable, not a data-driven replay. The hub must run this pytest module with the warpline package importable on sys.path; the JSON below is the vector index, the assertions live in the module. Resolve the module relative to wherever this fixture tree is mounted.

vectors.assert: 2-entity change -> items len 2, each carries locator+sei, changed_refs SEI-keyed, next_actions names warpline_reverify_worklist_get
3 SEIs, one never-observed -> items len 3, observed >=1, unobserved churn_count 0 (not omitted, not error)
loomweave available full neighborhood -> FULL, edges>0; absent -> SKIPPED, edges 0, enrichment.edges skipped, exit 0
locator resolves -> sei stored, enrichment.sei present; loomweave absent -> sei null, enrichment.sei unavailable
filigree present, linked P1 issue -> item priority P1, enrichment.work[0].issue_status populated, next_actions.filigree is a candidate (warpline filed nothing)
filigree absent -> enrichment.work [], envelope enrichment.work unavailable, worklist still non-empty
SEI X with one bound issue -> work-enrichment shows issue_id; SEI with no binding -> [] (not error)
depth-2 over changed entity, FULL snapshot -> affected non-empty, completeness FULL, staleness.commits_behind 0
no snapshot -> completeness NO_SNAPSHOT, changed only, exit 0
wardline absent -> enrichment.risk unavailable, items ordered by depth, never marked clean/allowed
depth-2 advisory set -> completeness+staleness present, meta.local_only true, no governance verdict
rename feed {old,new} -> timeline for new locator includes pre-rename events, governance present; absent -> raw-git fallback, governance unavailable
every response carries meta.local_only true, peer_side_effects []

hard mid-capture failure (loomweave killed) leaves the prior snapshot intact and visible (fail-closed); no edge_snapshots row is visible until all its edges are committed; never a degraded DELTA/0-edge row
sei absence is explained: change_list no-SEI -> enrichment.sei absent + enrichment_reasons.sei reason_class unresolved_input; capture loomweave-down -> sei unavailable + reason_class unreachable
timeline governance is explained: rename feed -> governance present + enrichment_reasons.governance clean; no feed -> governance unavailable + reason_class disabled
reserved requirements dimension carries a stable disabled triple (reserved, not yet wired) on every tool; scalar stays unavailable

reverify carries an honest verification block on the DATA item (never the frozen enrichment vocab): no source -> every item unverified + disabled triple + local_source_configured false; record a gate pass at the change commit -> fresh + last_verified_commit set + local_source_configured true; recording verification never removes an item (never-filter); meta.local_only true / peer_side_effects []

reserved_shape_inbound.filigree: EARNED — warpline consumes entity_association_list_by_entity + issue_get for reverify work enrichment (GV-FI-1, GV-FI-3)
reserved_shape_inbound.wardline: NON-BINDING — degrade only (risk: unavailable); warpline does not consume wardline findings (GV-WL-3)
reserved_shape_inbound.legis: NON-BINDING member; the generic locator-rename FEED shape is earned (GV-LG-2), legis stays a future external supplier
